title: button click causes unhandled rejection in payload-delegate
description: Clicking any button throws an unhandled rejection at payload-delegate.ts. The buildPayload promise chain in contracts-safefire.ts had no .catch(), so any invoke rejection propagated as unhandled. Also coords.selected.join could crash on non-array values.
resolution: Added .catch() to buildPayload promise chain in contracts-safefire.ts. Guarded coords.selected.join with Array.isArray check in payload-delegate.ts.
